_comment: STARTER REVEAL — plays from Acacia's 'Choose a partner' button the moment the three stand-ins spawn (professor_acacia starter_button, gated not_tag ci_starters_spawned so it fires exactly once). ABSOLUTE path anchored to the fixed stand-in spawn coords (Skiddo 2675.5/128/2899.5, Hisuian Growlithe 2676.5/128/2901.5, Totodile 2675.5/128/2903.5; Acacia behind the row at 2674.5/128/2901.5). KEYFRAME-Y CONVENTION (see docs/ENGINE_FINDINGS.md): the spectated rig renders ~1.78 above keyframe y (armor-stand eye height), so y here is 'feet level' — 127.6 renders the camera eye at ~129.4, head height for the one-block partners. Showrunner-tuned close-up positions 2026-07-16 (hard cuts ticks:1 + 55-tick holds, order Totodile -> Skiddo -> Growlithe = left -> right -> centre from the east camera, then a smooth zoom out). Lab interior RCON block-probed: open pocket x2672-2678 at z2899-2903, corridor mouth open through x2685 at z2900-2902; every rendered-eye position + sight line verified air. Dev-stack caveat (SMOKETEST 1.7): the Hisuian Growlithe stand-in needs AllTheMons (ships in the mrpack) to render the Hisuian model.
